body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91620858?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rootingg", "id": 91620858, "login": "Rootingg", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXYF-g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42551", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-436", "name": "Interpretation Conflict"}], "description": "### Summary `Request::getMethod()` unconditionally honors the `X-HTTP-Method-Override` header and the `$_REQUEST['_method']` parameter on **any** HTTP verb (including safe verbs such as GET), with no opt-in and no whitelist of permitted target methods. A GET request can silently become a DELETE or PUT, enabling CSRF escalation against destructive endpoints, bypass of middleware gated on unsafe verbs, and cache poisoning between CDN and origin. ### Affected code `flight/net/Request.php` (≈ lines 281-292): ```php public static function getMethod(): string { $method = self::getVar('REQUEST_METHOD', 'GET'); if (self::getVar('HTTP_X_HTTP_METHOD_OVERRIDE') !== '') { $method = self::getVar('HTTP_X_HTTP_METHOD_OVERRIDE'); } elseif (isset($_REQUEST['_method']) === true) { $method = $_REQUEST['_method']; } return strtoupper($method); } ``` `$_REQUEST` aggregates `$_GET` and `$_POST`; on PHP runtimes with `request_order=GPC` it also includes `$_COOKIE`. ### Proof of concept ``` GET /item/42?_method=DELETE HTTP/1.1 ``` is dispatched as `DELETE /item/42`. ``` GET /item/42 HTTP/1.1 X-HTTP-Method-Override: DELETE ``` is also dispatched as `DELETE /item/42`. Trivial CSRF vector (no JavaScript required): ```html ``` loaded on any attacker-controlled page triggers the destructive DELETE on page load, bypassing Same-Origin Policy (image loads are not blocked). Reproduced against `/poc4/item/42`. ### Impact - GET → DELETE / PUT CSRF on any route registered for unsafe verbs. - Bypass of authentication, CSRF token, or rate-limiting middleware that is gated only on POST/DELETE. - CDN cache poisoning: the CDN caches the GET response body while the origin executed a DELETE. ### Patch (fixed in `3.18.1`, commit `b8dd23a`) A new `flight.allow_method_override` setting controls both override vectors. Operators can set it to `false` to disable `X-HTTP-Method-Override` and `_method` entirely. ### Credit Discovered by **@Rootingg**.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0031, "percentile": 0.225}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:38:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42551"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T20:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:38:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/flightphp/core/security/advisories/GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g", "https://github.com/flightphp/core/commit/b8dd23aaa828cb289fa3c84e75b2a3717cab50b0", "https://github.com/flightphp/core/releases/tag/v3.18.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42551", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/flightphp/core/security-advisories/GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/flightphp/core", "summary": "Flight: HTTP method override enabled by default, facilitating CSRF escalation and middleware bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:40:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxrr-w42w-w76g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "flightphp/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.18.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flight: HTTP method override enabled by default, facilitating CSRF escalation and middleware bypass
